name: Multi-Asset State and Backtest Implementation
edge_rationale: BTC+ETH trial-00095 portfolio evidence is strong enough to build offline state and backtest contracts while BTC PAPER and M4 monitoring continue unchanged.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No new market edge is tested in the first implementation phase. The milestone implements offline portfolio state and gate contracts required to replay the already validated BTC+ETH sweep/reclaim edge.
frozen_assumptions: Offline/research implementation only before M4 checkpoint.
State models live under research_lab/models, not core.
No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, orchestrator, execution, storage migration, or settings changes.
No ETH PAPER or BTC+ETH PAPER approval from this milestone.
expected_observation: A correct implementation provides deterministic SymbolRiskState, PortfolioRiskState, portfolio cap checks, same-bar ordering, veto reasons, and recovery simulations matching the audited architecture blueprint.

kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any change to runtime/core/settings/execution/orchestrator/storage migration invalidates the offline-only milestone.
kill_criteria.production_db_write: Any write to production storage/btc_bot.db invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.parameter_change: Any change to active BTC trial-00095 parameters invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.deployment_claim: Any PAPER/LIVE approval claim invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: Portfolio state accidentally mirrors current global runtime state instead of splitting symbol and portfolio views.
Per-symbol cooldown blocks the wrong symbol.
Portfolio caps fail to account for already accepted same-bar signals.
Offline implementation drifts from the audited architecture blueprint.
author: Codex
